creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #21)

While we are at it, after LLVM default was switched to 19, this does not compile anymore on 2025Q1 (didn't try main).

Solution is adding the following lines, though I don't know why:

.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
LLVM_DEFAULT=   18
